overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. The player moves from a plaza through city streets, under an overpass, and along a waterfront promenade, passing neon signs, towering skyscrapers, and light traffic. The wet pavement reflects the warm sunset and colorful artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with yellow barriers and debris

events.description: passing through black metal gate from enclosed plaza onto city sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through urban plaza toward street exit

entered.detail: low yellow walls blocking off the plaza area
tall black metal gate structure with graffiti
large purple neon sign with Japanese characters and TENOU text
towering futuristic glass and steel buildings against the dusk sky
scattered trash and litter on the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in an urban plaza with yellow concrete barriers and scattered debris. The camera moves forward through a black metal gate, transitioning from the enclosed plaza toward the city street, with the neon TENOU sign and futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with neon advertisements

events.description: futuristic vehicles with headlights on driving along the multi-lane street
turning slightly right to follow the street curve toward the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk next to moving traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan with glowing elements driving past on the street

entered.detail: tall building with orange and green facade and large digital displays
wet multi-lane road reflecting the city lights
large horizontal billboard displaying BIOTECHNICA advertisement
elevated walkway with bright orange cladding crossing over the street
tall skyscraper with large 02 marking and multiple advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: Walking along a multi-lane city street with light traffic, futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt. The camera approaches an orange pedestrian overpass, with the large BIOTECHNICA billboard and a distinctive building marked 02 becoming prominent features in the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian overpass underpass transitioning to waterfront

events.description: passing from open street into covered area beneath the orange pedestrian bridge
emerging from underpass into open waterfront promenade with palm trees

agents.ego_description: passing under the orange pedestrian overpass and emerging onto the waterfront path

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the promenade

entered.detail: massive concrete support columns holding up the overpass
small illuminated shop structure with advertisements on the right side
tall palm trees lining the waterfront path
large stadium-like structure with illuminated signage across the water
tall vertical digital billboards mounted on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera passes underneath the orange pedestrian overpass, entering a temporarily sheltered space with concrete pillars, then emerges into an open waterfront promenade. A small illuminated kiosk sits on the right, while palm trees line the path ahead and a large waterfront arena structure becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees and stadium view

events.description: continuing along the curved path following the pedestrian ahead

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in an orange jacket along the curved waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing orange jacket walking steadily ahead on the path

entered.detail: futuristic tower complex visible across the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: Following a pedestrian wearing an orange jacket, the camera continues along the curved waterfront promenade lined with palm trees. Vertical advertising screens illuminate the left side of the path, while the distant stadium structure and futuristic towers remain visible across the water against the fading sunset.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty urban plaza into the expansive, neon-lit heart of a cyberpunk waterfront at dusk. It begins by passing through a black metal gate and leaving behind yellow concrete barriers and debris, moving toward a city street where the TENOU sign and towering skyscrapers loom against the darkening sky. As the camera advances along the wet asphalt past futuristic vehicles, the view shifts toward a prominent BIOTECHNICA billboard and a building marked 02 before passing underneath the shelter of an orange pedestrian overpass. The scene then opens into a waterfront promenade, emerging from beneath concrete pillars to pass an illuminated kiosk and a line of palm trees. Finally, the camera follows a pedestrian in an orange jacket along the curved path, flanked by glowing vertical advertising screens and a distant stadium structure reflecting the fading sunset.
